title: SnapStone
description: Use redstone with a snap of your fingers.
body:
This mod adds two Redstone blocks; the Snap Detector and the Toggled Snap Detector. The Snap Detector emits a Redstone pulse when a player presses the configurable keybind ( by default, H ). The Toggled Snap Detector does the same but toggles on and off like a lever.

 

When a player snaps using the keybind, all detectors within 15 blocks trigger. If you place a comparator near a Snap or Toggled Snap Detector, it will output how far away the snap originated.

 

Other players on servers can also hear your snaps.

 

This project requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).


This mod is a Llamarama Team mod. Consider following us on [Github](https://github.com/LlamaramaTeam) and checking out our other mods!
